name: FETAL CNS ANOMALIES
chapter: DIFFERENTIAL DIAGNOSIS OF OBSTETRIC AND GYNECOLOGIC
definition: atrial width of 10-15 mm flat / inwardly scalloped contour of both frontal bones

demographics.Prevalence: 2÷1,000 births in USA; 90% as 1st time occurrence

en bloc displacement of cerebellum + vermis
